query:
SELECT 
  s.externalId,
  s.planName,
  s.serviceId,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  s.supplierName,
  s.customerName,
  sba.billingItemExternalId,
  sba.assignmentMethod,
  bi.description AS billing_item_description,
  bi.lineAmount AS billing_item_amount,
  bi.unitAmount,
  bi.quantity,
  bi.accountCode,
  bi.contactName
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
LEFT JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.externalId = sba.billingItemExternalId
WHERE s.supplierName LIKE '%Channel%' OR s.supplierName LIKE '%ECN%'
ORDER BY (s.monthlyRevenue - s.monthlyCost) ASC
LIMIT 15;

  s.monthlyCost,

  s.supplierName,

  sba.billingItemExternalId,
  sba.assignmentMethod,
  bi.description AS billing_item_description,
  bi.lineAmount AS billing_item_amount,
  bi.unitAmount,
  bi.quantity,
  bi.accountCode,
  bi.contactName
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
LEFT JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.externalId = sba.billingItemExternalId
WHERE s.supplierName LIKE '%Channel%' OR s.supplierName LIKE '%ECN%'
ORDER BY (s.monthlyRevenue - s.monthlyCost) ASC
LIMIT 15;
